name: Black & White
recipeInstructions:
1. Brew a strong Darjeeling Tea using 6 tea bags and 4 cups of boiling water.
2. Steep for 5 minutes, then gently squeeze the tea bags and remove them.
3. Pour V2 cup plus 2 tablespoons of hot tea into each serving cup.
4. In the steamer of an Ail espresso machine, foam milk until desired consistency is reached.
5. Top each cup with foamed milk.
6. Sweeten to taste with granulated sugar.
Per serving: 100 calories (21 percent from protein, 30 percent from carbohydrate, 49 percent from fat), 5 grams protein, 8 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams fat, 22 milligrams cholesterol, 80 milligrams sodium.
Exchanges: 1/2 milk, 1 fat.
Makes 6 servings.
